subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Verily, truthfulness, fellowship, peace and reconciliation with all the peoples of the world are among the requirements of devotion to Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق راستی و دوستی و صلح و آشتی با جمیع عالمیان از مقتضای حق پرستیست در
subcodes.subjects: @hypocrisy, @contention and conflict, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @unity; oneness of humanity
